items.name: libnanodispatch
items.description: A blazing-fast, lock-free, zero-allocation MPMC event dispatcher using C++23 modules. Implements an LMAX Disruptor-style sequence barrier ring buffer with raw storage tracking, custom RAII element destruction, and cross-platform assembly spin-relax primitives for sub-microsecond latency. pretty cool, right?

items.name: libctdi
items.description: A blazing-fast, zero-allocation compile-time dependency injection container using C++26 static reflection and modern modules. libctdi automatically extracts dependencies, prevents heap allocations via stack construction, and uses graph analysis to catch circular references at compile time. pretty cool, right?

items.name: ANTIRTOS
items.description: Unleash your interrupts with an ultra-fast task manager, delivering tens of thousands of push/pull TPS even on simple MCUs. Interrupts stay blazing fast by enqueueing parameterized tasks instead of executing logic immediately. Whenever the program must wait, useful tasks run instead—eliminating blocking and dummy wait loops. The simplicity matter!
